name: workspace-quality-gate
description: Non-destructive quality-gate checks for Codex Workspace release readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Runs release-readiness checks for Codex Workspace.
interface.longDescription: Provides a local quality-gate skill for validating workspace doctors, Workspace Hub tests/build/lint, and non-destructive stable release checks without rewriting repo content.
defaultPrompt: Run the workspace quality gate and tell me what still blocks a stable release.
Check whether Workspace Hub is release-ready after my latest changes.
Verify that the current workspace changes preserved existing repo content.
